name: Bhai Ajit Singh Alankari
body: Bhai Ajit Singh Ji Alankari was born on 14th August 1940 in the city of Rawalpindi, which is now in Pakistan. He was one of the senior students of Giani Hardit Singh Ji of the Gurmat Vidhyala at Gurdwara Rakab Ganj Sahib. In his early years, Alankari Ji accompanied Bhai Inder Singh Gujranwala on the side harmonium before forming his own jatha. Bhai Ajit Singh Alankari began his tour around the world in 1972 and he  traveled to 85 countries in total before settling down in Montreal, Canada in 1988. He was very knowledgeable about Raags and always made it a point to announce the name of the Raag to the Sangat before he performed. This would spark an interest among the youth to find out more.  One of his many strengths was his grasp on history, and his ability to weave it into the Shabads being sung to capture the attention of the Sangat. He always made it his priority to attach the listener to Guru Ji’s Shabad through his Kirtan and Katha. With the blessings of Guru Ji, he was also involved in the selfless service of teaching Kirtan around the world. Bhai Ajit Singh Alankari passed away peacefully on 20th February 2014. If anyone has more information or recordings of Bhai Ajit Singh Alankari to share, please contact us.
